  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
  2. Population

Verwendungen von Klasse
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.Population

Packages, die Population verwenden
Package
Beschreibung
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller
Contains the main execution controllers and initialization factories for the Genetic Algorithm framework.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core
Contains the fundamental, problem-agnostic building blocks of the Darwinian evolutionary engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection
Contains implementations of the Selection operator for the Darwinian Engine.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.cryptanalysis
Implementation of the Cryptanalysis substitution cipher solver.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.knapsack
Implementation of the Knapsack optimization problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.sudoku
Implementation of the Sudoku puzzle problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.symreg
Implementation of the Symbolic Regression problem.
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.problems.tsp
Implementation of the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP).
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.io
Contains input/output operations for the Genetic Algorithm framework.

    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller, die Population zurückgeben
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Population<T>
    GAController.getPopulation()
    Retrieves the current, actively evolving population.

  • Verwendungen von Population in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core

    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core, die Population zurückgeben
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    final Population<T>
    GeneticAlgorithm.evolve(Population<T> currentGeneration)
    Evolves the given population by one generation.
    Population<T>
    GAProblem.getInitialPopulation(int populationSize)
    Generates a fully randomized initial population of the required data structure to seed generation 0.
    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core mit Parametern vom Typ Population
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    final Population<T>
    GeneticAlgorithm.evolve(Population<T> currentGeneration)
    Evolves the given population by one generation.

  • Verwendungen von Population in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection

    Methoden in de.fhdwhannover.integrea.ga.core.selection mit Parametern vom Typ Population
    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Individual<T>
    LinearRankingSelection.select(Population<T> population)
    Selects an individual using linear ranking probabilities.
    Individual<T>
    RouletteSelection.select(Population<T> population)
    Selects an individual based on fitness proportionate probability.
    Individual<T>
    Selection.select(Population<T> population)
    Executes a specific selection algorithm (e.g., Tournament, Roulette Wheel) to extract a single candidate.
    Individual<T>
    StochasticUniversalSelection.select(Population<T> population)
    Selects a single individual using stochastic universal sampling.
    Individual<T>
    TournamentSelection.select(Population<T> population)
    Selects the fittest individual from a randomly sampled subset of the population.
